heading: Committee on Rules and Administration; designation of employees to approve vouchers for payments from Senate contingent fund
label: 6504 Committee on Rules and Administration; designation of employees to approve vouchers for payments from Senate contingent fund
text: The Committee on Rules and Administration may authorize its chairman to designate any employee or employees of such Committee to approve in his behalf, all vouchers making payments from the contingent fund of the Senate, such approval to be deemed and held to be approval by the Committee on Rules and Administration for all intents and purposes.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 68–1 of this title

Amendments1984— substituted “any employee or employees of such Committee” for “the committee Auditor and the committee Assistant Auditor”.Pub. L. 98–4731981— substituted “the committee Auditor and the committee Assistant Auditor” for “one committee employee”.Pub. L. 97–51
amendments: Amendments1984— substituted “any employee or employees of such Committee” for “the committee Auditor and the committee Assistant Auditor”.Pub. L. 98–4731981— substituted “the committee Auditor and the committee Assistant Auditor” for “one committee employee”.Pub. L. 97–51
